tasks.noticing_probe_answer: Yes. `schema.ts` had `errorEnvelopeStyle: "code_message"`, but the spec of record (rebuilt from the archived `error-format-revision` change) already required `error.type`/`error.detail` — i.e., `"type_detail"`. The code was out of sync with the spec; I corrected it during implementation.
